allow: PowerShell($ids = @\('Git.Git','OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS','GitHub.cli'\); foreach \($id in $ids\) { Write-Output "=== installing $id ==="; winget install --id $id -e --source winget --silent --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity | Select-Object -Last 3 })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); foreach \($c in 'git','node','npm','gh'\) { $p = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "{0,-5} {1,-10} {2}" -f $c, \(& $c --version 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1\), $p.Source } else { "$c : NOT FOUND" } })
